title: Provider Configuration
description: Configuration for a single LLM provider in the council.

provider.description: Provider name (e.g., openai, anthropic, gemini, llamafile, ollama).

api_key.description: API key or ${ENV_VAR} reference. Omit for platform mode or keyless local providers.

api_base.description: Custom base URL for local/self-hosted LLMs. Omit for cloud providers.

local.description: Set to true for local/self-hosted providers. Affects failure path tolerance.
